items.title: Fullstack Developer - Contract
description: Working on the company's SaaS product Klipbot and other MVP products.
Developed multivendor full-stack features including chatbots, customizable surveys, and real-time feedback handling.
Maintained analytics dashboards with sentiment alerts, data tracking, and report generation.
Integrated Meta APIs and AI-powered workflows while building scalable backend systems for complex business scenarios.

items.title: Fullstack Developer
description: Worked on Bekia's GreenTech product and internal tools that supported workflow across sales, accounting, operations, and customer support.
Built and maintained systems such as Warehouse Management, Human Resources Management, and Point of Sale solutions.
Managed mobile APIs, the customer support dashboard serving more than 50K active users monthly, and CRM systems.
Worked with cross-functional teams to resolve product challenges and improve user experience.

items.title: Back End Developer
description: Worked on the company's EdTech platform Yaqees, featuring score tracking, flashcards, and assessment dashboards.
Built tailored APIs, CMS, and CRM systems to support business and student-facing workflows.
Participated in developing the backend for educational courses and mobile API endpoints using Laravel and Passport.

items.title: Software Developer
description: Developed engaging interactive experiences and simulations.
Drove products through production phases, from concept implementation to dynamic working solutions.
Managed backend endpoints built in PHP and integrated them into Unity applications.
